diffCoverage.notes: Concur with security + architecture reviewers; verified the encrypted-at-rest credential path and the done-gate status.

findings.evidence: doneRequires includes `smoke`, but cred_store_roundtrip (real OS keychain + AES-GCM roundtrip + ciphertext-on-disk + relaunch auto-restore) is #[ignore] and is one of the 8 ignored tests — not run.
findings.fix: Run `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --ignored cred_store_roundtrip --nocapture` and verify GUI relaunch auto-restore.

findings.evidence: No evidence bundle exists at .harness/evidence/secure-cred-store.json, so there is no machine-readable proof linking the gates + reviewer artifacts.
findings.fix: Author the attested evidence bundle (build/lint/tests/smoke + the three reviewer artifacts) before passes:true; record message-plaintext-at-rest as an ADR-0005-accepted known risk.

findings.evidence: security-reviewer and architecture-reviewer both returned needs-human (no blocking findings) pending the unrun smoke; required reviewers must reach pass for a done claim.
findings.fix: Re-run both reviewers to pass after the live smoke + evidence bundle land.

findings.evidence: crypto.rs AES-256-GCM seal/open is correct (random nonce, 32-byte keychain master key, opaque errors, truncated-blob guard, ciphertext-not-plaintext asserted); rusqlite/keyring/aes-gcm confined to store; no token across IPC; cargo build/clippy -D warnings clean and 23 tests pass.
findings.fix: No code change needed; proceed to the live-proof + evidence steps.

summary: secure-cred-store is implemented soundly — AES-256-GCM credential-at-rest under a single keychain master key, ciphertext-only in SQLite (unit-test asserted), store-confined native deps, no token across IPC, and clean build/lint/23 tests. But it cannot honestly be marked done: the `smoke` gate (live keychain roundtrip + relaunch auto-restore) is #[ignore] and unrun, no evidence bundle exists, and both required reviewers returned needs-human pending that proof. Decision: needs-human. Keep feature_list passes:false until the live smoke runs, the evidence bundle is authored, and the reviewers move to pass.
